# @pihanga2/core

> The core runtime library for the Pihanga declarative, card-based UI framework for React.


@pihanga2/core is the runtime engine of the Pihanga declarative,
card-based UI framework for React. It provides card registration,
Redux store bootstrap, hash/history routing, and typed REST-API helpers.


## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://ivcap-works.github.io/pihanga-core/getting-started/installation/index.md)
- [Quick Start](https://ivcap-works.github.io/pihanga-core/getting-started/quick-start/index.md)

- [REST Full Reference](https://ivcap-works.github.io/pihanga-core/guides/rest-usage/index.md)
